query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the CHP çağrı heyeti / Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi application status as of July 1, 2026:

**Direct answers to your two questions:**

1. **Has Özgür Özel's team filed the Art. 75 application for a 3-person çağrı heyeti?**
   - The Özel faction (led by MP Süleyman Bülbül) has **publicly announced and moved to file** an application at a **Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi** to appoint a çağrı heyeti, on the legal basis of **Türk Medeni Kanunu Article 75** (the same provision used in the 2016 MHP precedent).
   - **Timing is reported inconsistently**: Several outlets (Haberler, Haber Ekspres, Yeni Akit) said the filing was for **June 29, 2026**; Türkiye Gazetesi tied a formal trigger to a **July 11, 2026** deadline. A fully confirmed, docketed filing is **not definitively established** in available sources as of July 1.
   - Minor source discrepancy: a couple of outlets referenced Asliye Hukuk Mahkemesi (where the prior nullity cases sit), but the çağrı heyeti request belongs to the Sulh Hukuk track.

2. **Has any court issued a decision?**
   - **No.** As of July 1, 2026, **no court has ruled** on the çağrı heyeti request. It remains pending/prospective in all reporting.

**Key context**: Trigger was the May 21 "mutlak butlan" ruling reinstating Kılıçdaroğlu; 833 delegate signatures submitted June 17 with a 10-day deadline that lapsed; if granted, a congress must follow within 45 days (target July 26); the July 20 judicial recess is a complicating factor; and the Özel camp is simultaneously floating a "Plan B" new party.

The full structured findings (key facts, data points, and 12 sources) have been recorded via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi büyüyor! Özel'in ekibi bugün mahkemeye gidiyor
sources.snippet: Özel faction petitioning Ankara sulh hukuk mahkemesi for a çağrı heyeti (call committee) because Kılıçdaroğlu leadership has not called a congress despite 833 delegates; if granted, congress within 45 days.

sources.title: CHP adliye koridorlarına hapsoldu! Kurultay da ihraçlar da mahkemelik olacak
sources.snippet: Özel faction plans to file at Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi on July 11 if petition not processed; congress must be held within 45 days (target July 26); no court decision yet.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi mahkemede
sources.snippet: Özel team to request today that sulh hukuk mahkemesi appoint a çağrı heyeti; if accepted CHP goes to extraordinary congress within 45 days at latest.

sources.title: Kurultay kararı yargıya kaldı
sources.snippet: If Genel Merkez does not convene congress, Özel team to file with Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi; court expected to decide within 15 days, possibly appointing a call committee; nullity case pending at İstinaf.

sources.title: Kurultay olmazsa yeni parti
sources.snippet: Özel team to file lawsuit at Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi to request appointment of a call committee; judicial holiday starting July 20 could interrupt proceedings; 'Plan B' new party discussed.

sources.title: Kılıçdaroğlu harekete geçti! Belediye başkanlarına kötü haber
sources.snippet: Özel-supporting faction led by MP Süleyman Bülbül plans to file a lawsuit with the Asliye Hukuk Mahkemesi today to demand a call committee after Genel Merkez refused to process 833 signatures.

sources.title: Özgür Özel'den tüm Türkiye'yi sallayacak hamle! Bugün düğmeye basıyor
sources.snippet: Özel's team to request the Sulh Hukuk Court appoint a call committee today; if granted, CHP mandated to hold extraordinary congress within 45 days.

sources.title: CHP'de karar haftası
sources.snippet: 833 signatures delivered to Genel Merkez with 10-day deadline that expired Friday; Kılıçdaroğlu side says valid count is 820 after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals; no response yet.

sources.title: Mahkeme, MHP kararının gerekçesini açıkladı
sources.snippet: Precedent: Ankara 12th Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi appointed a 'Kurultay Çağrı Heyeti' for MHP, rejecting leadership jurisdictional objection under Political Parties Law and Medeni Kanun Article 75.

sources.title: CHP Sözcüsü Zeynel Emre soruları yanıtladı
sources.snippet: Emre calls for immediate Yargıtay decision; cites AYM/YSK precedents mandating extraordinary congress if majority of delegates sign; discusses new party.

sources.title: CHP'de 26 il başkanı daha görevden alındı
sources.snippet: Kılıçdaroğlu-led MYK dismissed 26 provincial chairmen and referred 7 for expulsion on June 30, 2026.

sources.title: Çok konuşulan kayyum isimleri... Özel'in A Takımına sorduk
sources.snippet: Media-floated names (Hikmet Çetin, Murat Karayalçın, Önder Sav) for a call committee; Özel-camp lawyer Gül Çiftçi disputes the 'kayyum' framing.

key_facts: May 21, 2026: Ankara Bölge Adliye Mahkemesi 36. Hukuk Dairesi issued 'mutlak butlan' (absolute nullity) ruling on CHP's 38th Ordinary Congress, reinstating Kılıçdaroğlu and removing Özgür Özel's administration.

833 delegate signatures for an extraordinary congress were submitted to CHP Genel Merkez on June 17, 2026, with a 10-day deadline for the leadership to act (Kılıçdaroğlu side reported valid count fell to ~820).
The 10-day deadline expired without the Kılıçdaroğlu leadership calling a congress, triggering Özel's team's judicial route.
Özel's team (led by MP Süleyman Bülbül) announced it would apply to a Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi requesting appointment of a çağrı heyeti (call committee) — legal basis Türk Medeni Kanunu Article 75.
Reporting is inconsistent on timing: several outlets said the filing was for June 29, 2026 ('today'); Türkiye Gazetesi tied a formal trigger to a July 11, 2026 deadline.
As of July 1, 2026, NO court has issued any decision on the çağrı heyeti application — it remains pending/prospective in all reporting.
If a çağrı heyeti is appointed, an extraordinary congress must be held within 45 days; circulated target congress date is July 26, 2026.
Court is expected to decide within ~15 days of application (Sözcü); judicial recess (adli tatil) beginning July 20, 2026 could interrupt proceedings.

Legal precedent: In 2016, the Ankara 12th Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi appointed a 'Kurultay Çağrı Heyeti' for the MHP, rejecting the leadership's jurisdictional objection under Medeni Kanun Article 75 (with Political Parties Law and Associations Law).
The underlying nullity (butlan) case remains pending on appeal at İstinaf/Yargıtay; CHP spokesman Zeynel Emre called for an immediate Yargıtay decision on July 1, 2026.
Some outlets loosely termed the requested body a 'kayyum'; Özel-camp lawyer Gül Çiftçi disputed that characterization.
Kılıçdaroğlu-led MYK dismissed 26 provincial chairmen on June 30, 2026 and referred 7 for expulsion; Özel camp is openly discussing a 'Plan B' new party after the July 20 judicial recess.

data_points.metric: Delegate signatures submitted for extraordinary congress
Valid signatures per Kılıçdaroğlu side after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals
Deadline given to Genel Merkez to convene congress
Maximum period to hold extraordinary congress if çağrı heyeti approved
Expected time for court to issue decision after application
Provincial chairmen dismissed by Kılıçdaroğlu-led MYK
Court decisions issued on çağrı heyeti application
